dosingInfo.rawDosageText: DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION Each Pyridostigmine Bromide Tablet contains 60 mg pyridostigmine bromide. Dosage The size and frequency of the dosage must be adjusted to the needs of the individual patient. The average dose is ten 60 mg tablets daily, spaced to provide maximum relief when maximum strength is needed. In severe cases as many as twenty-five tablets a day may be required, while in mild cases one to six tablets a day may suffice. NOTE: For information on a diagnostic test for myasthenia gr
